description_long: This is a standard traffic cone with a tall, conical shape and a wide, hexagonal base for stability. The cone is predominantly orange with significant areas of surface wear, revealing a weathered and dirty appearance, especially around the lower half. A single broad, grayish reflective stripe encircles the middle section, providing visibility in low-light conditions. The tip of the cone is pointed and solid, matching the orange color of the rest of the cone, and shows some signs of scuffing. The base appears to be made of a heavier, black material, likely rubber, and is textured for grip and stability. No logos, text, or additional markings are visible on any side of the cone.
description: A weathered orange traffic cone with a wide, textured black base and a single gray reflective stripe around its midsection.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange cone with a broad gray reflective stripe and a visibly worn, dirty lower section.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, highlighting the same features with minor differences in the distribution of dirt and wear.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, with the reflective stripe and base still prominent, and the wear pattern slightly shifted.
description_view_3: Final view, similar to the others, showing the cone's pointed tip and the consistent weathered appearance.
attribute_reflective_stripes: One broad, gray reflective stripe encircles the midsection of the cone.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is pointed, solid, and orange, with visible scuffing but no attachments.
attribute_base_design: The base is wide, hexagonal, black, and appears thick and heavy for stability, with a textured surface for grip.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos or markings are visible.
attribute_condition: Worn and dirty, with visible surface wear and fading, especially on the lower half.
